title: Jalavash worm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Jalavash Worm''' was a creature native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. The worm produced silk fibers that were used in traditional [[Twi'leki/Legends|Twi'leki]] robes.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-10-05 -->''[[Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
